# OpenAI Node.js SDK Releases

## Latest Releases

**v6.34.0** (April 8, 2026)
- Added phase field to Message in conversations
- Added support for short-lived tokens
- Bug fix: Removed web_search_call.results from ResponseIncludable in responses
- Documentation: Added multi-file ingestion recommendations for vector-stores

**v6.33.0** (March 25, 2026)
- Added keys field to computer action types
- Implemented async iterator and stream() functionality for WebSocket classes
- Aligned SDK response types with expanded item schemas
- Made type field required in ResponseInputMessageItem
- Migrated testing framework from prism to steady

**v6.32.0** (March 17, 2026)
- Added support for GPT-5.4 nano and mini model slugs

**v6.31.0** (March 16, 2026)
- Introduced "in/nin" filter types to ComparisonFilter

**v6.30.0** (March 16, 2026)
- Added /v1/videos endpoint option to batch processing
- Introduced defer_loading field to NamespaceTool
- Fixed OIDC publishing for npm distribution

**v6.29.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Implemented custom voices functionality

**v6.28.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Sora API enhancements including character API, video extensions/edits, higher resolution exports
- Manual API updates
- Removed detail field from ResponseInputFile and ResponseInputFileContent
- Updated WebSocket protocol matching

**v6.27.0** (March 5, 2026)
- Transitioned ComputerTool to GA; moved computer_use_preview to ComputerUsePreview class

**v6.26.0** (March 5, 2026)
- GPT-5.4 model release
- Tool search functionality
- New computer tool implementation
- Internal schema corrections
- Phase parameter management adjustments

**v6.25.0** (February 24, 2026)
- Added phase parameter; refined phase enum implementation; refactored SSE event parsing

## Repository Metrics
- Stars: 10.8k
- Forks: 1.5k
- Open Issues: 114
- Pull Requests: 75

## Build/Test Infrastructure
- Updated CI/testing infrastructure with steady v0.19.4-0.19.7 bumps

Updated: 2026-04-10
